description_long: This is a tan cowboy hat with a wide, curved brim and a medium-height crown. The brim features prominent decorative cross-stitching in a dark thread, running along its edge and continuing around the base of the crown. The crown itself is pinched at the front and has additional stitching along the top edge, giving it a rugged, hand-crafted appearance. The material appears to be suede or faux suede, with a soft, matte finish and visible texture. The underside of the brim is darker, possibly black, providing contrast to the lighter exterior. This hat is typically worn for sun protection and style, often associated with Western or cowboy attire.
description: A tan suede cowboy hat with a wide, curved brim and decorative cross-stitching, featuring a pinched crown and a dark underside.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the wide, curved brim and prominent cross-stitching along the brim and crown.
description_view_1: Left-rear view highlighting the pinched crown and the continuous decorative stitching around the brim.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the symmetrical curve of the brim and the crown's stitching details.
description_view_3: Right-rear view emphasizing the hat's dark underside and the rugged, hand-crafted look of the brim.
